1782680.name: Caribbean Legend: Sandbox
1782680.description:
Welcome to the Caribbean in 1654 AD, a place teeming with opportunities and mysteries. Assume the role of one of the three adventurers: youthful French aristocrat, a formidable Spanish mercenary, or a savvy English entrepreneur. Explore, trade, plunder, complete quests and enjoy the Caribbean Open World. This game has the most of improvements and a good portion of new content from the upcoming Caribbean Legend. Based on Sea Dogs series and inspired by Sid Meier's Pirates!




  • Freeplay: The Caribbean is your domain, offering everything from exploring ancient pyramids to capturing entire towns.
  • Hundred Recurring Quests: Engage in a myriad of quests, each with multiple potential outcomes, including freight jobs, bounty hunting, trading contracts, and more!
  • Unique Quests: Embark on twenty distinctive quests, each with its own compelling narrative.
  • Land and Naval Warfare: Transition from confronting thugs in jungles and pirating a small game to leading full-scale sieges and commanding an armada of warships.
  • Extensive Customisation: Tailor your experience with character builds, dozens of ships, and a vast array of over a hundred items and weapons.
  • Side Activities: Immerse yourself in a wide range of activities, including crafting, trading, duels, gambling, smuggling, romance, ship upgrading, and treasure hunting.
